title: Group Conversations
drDigitalIntro:
A group chat sends a message to several people at once.
• Click compose and add multiple contacts.
• Everyone in the group sees the replies.
• Great for events, family, and plans. You can add or remove people anytime.

playgroundTask.question: What is a group chat in Messages?

options.text: A chat where only one person can send messages
A conversation with multiple people at once

drDigitalSuccess: Right! Group chats include multiple people — everyone sees every message and can reply.
drDigitalHint: Group = more than one person. Chat = conversation. Group chat = conversation with more than one person.
